summary: Completed backend + frontend testing for upload-preview/apply/history workflow and route navigation. All backend regression tests pass; UI flow works end-to-end with one code-quality warning.
action_items: Fix duplicate React list keys where repeated "Not available" values are used as key props (e.g., recommendations/risk lists).
Optionally suppress or resolve Recharts width/height console warnings observed during route transitions.
critical_code_review_comments: ExecutiveSummaryPage uses value-based keys (e.g., key={item} / key={risk}); when parser fills repeated "Not available" entries, React logs duplicate key warnings and may mis-reconcile list items. Prefer stable unique keys (index+value or explicit IDs).
test_credentials: No credentials required for tested flows. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but contains no concrete credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test uploads via API (PDF/DOCX previews and applies), including 11 applies for history limit verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard report data is now based on latest test upload (ui_upload_missing_fields.docx), so period/key message may show 'Not available'. Upload history currently has 10 rows with latest test file included.
rca of the issue: Duplicate key warning RCA: uploading sparse files triggers fallback values 'Not available'. UI maps arrays using element text as React key (non-unique), causing duplicate key warnings. Mitigation: use stable unique keys for mapped items.
